puzzle.title: The Grand Throne's Journey
puzzle.intro: A powerful ruler, blessed with unparalleled dominion, once faced a curious report from a distant land. A kingdom, rich in splendor but misguided in its worship, presented a unique challenge. Our puzzle today revolves around the extraordinary events that unfolded when this ruler sought to guide the hearts of those who bowed to other than the One True God, demonstrating a miraculous power that transcended the ordinary.
clues: This figure was granted dominion over much of creation, including forces unseen by human eyes.
His wisdom extended to understanding the languages of birds and other creatures.
A specific bird brought him news of a prosperous queen and her people, who worshipped the sun.
He sent a message to this queen, inviting her to submit to the One God, and received a diplomatic reply.
Before her arrival, he challenged his assembly to bring her magnificent throne to him in an instant.
Upon seeing her throne miraculously present, the queen recognized the truth and submitted to Allah.
puzzle.verse: It was said to her, "Enter the palace." But when she saw it, she thought it was a body of water and uncovered her shins. He said, "Indeed, it is a palace paved with glass." She said, "My Lord, indeed I have wronged myself, and I submit with Solomon to Allah, Lord of the worlds." (An-Naml 27:44)
puzzle.arabic: قِيلَ لَهَا ادْخُلِي الصَّرْحَ ۖ فَلَمَّا رَأَتْهُ حَسِبَتْهُ لُجَّةً وَكَشَفَتْ عَن سَاقَيْهَا ۚ قَالَ إِنَّهُ صَرْحٌ مُّمَرَّدٌ مِّن قَوَارِيرَ ۗ قَالَتْ رَبِّ إِنِّي ظَلَمْتُ نَفْسِي وَأَسْلَمْتُ مَعَ سُلَيْمَانَ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ
